title: XRs Pistons
description: This is a resourcepack that edits the piston's textures and model.
body:
![header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2d12915b872b28ec7294e8514d66625d2f92d25.png)
## This is a resourcepack that edits the piston's textures and model to look more polished. It also changes the sounds to be quieter and less annoying



changes:

- the piston arms now has it's own texture.

- the back of the piston platforms has it's own texture.

- the platforms of the piston and sticky piston have slightly improved textures.

- the bottom/back of the pistons have a texture indicating whether they are retracted or not.

- the pistons pull and push sound have been updated to be less annoying
